rules: Session key generation MUST use cryptographically secure randomness
All signing operations MUST validate session key scope before execution
Private key material MUST never be logged, serialized, or exposed in error messages
Session key expiry and revocation MUST be enforced at the signer level
Every external/public function MUST have explicit access control checks
Policy guardrails MUST be validated on-chain before delegation execution
Session account isolation MUST prevent cross-session state leakage
All felt252 conversions MUST be bounds-checked to prevent overflow
Reentrancy guards MUST be present on all state-modifying functions
Delegate call patterns MUST validate target contract whitelist
CI must not expose secrets in logs or artifacts
All workflow triggers must be scoped to prevent unauthorized execution
Dependency pinning must use exact versions or SHA hashes
Security documentation must accurately reflect current implementation
Audit trail documentation must cover all delegation boundaries
API documentation must include authentication and authorization requirements
